info.title: Nimble CRM API
info.description: Nimble CRM API provides access to contacts, deals, pipelines, messages, and related resources. Supports OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow.

get.description: Returns authenticated user information including company details.
Returns a filtered contact list with pagination.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

parameters.name: record_type
parameters.description: Filter by record type (person or company)

delete.description: Delete contacts matching a search query.

get.description: Returns only contact IDs (faster than full list).
Retrieve specific contacts by ID list (max 30).
Retrieve all notes for a contact.

post.description: Add a note to a contact record.

put.description: Add or update tags on a contact.

post.description: Define a new custom contact field.

get.description: Retrieve all user deals with filtering.
Retrieve the sum of won deals amount for the last month.

post.description: Add a note to a deal.
Upload and attach a file to a deal.

file.description: File to attach to the deal

put.description: Update an existing file attached to a deal.

delete.description: Remove a file attached to a deal.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Pass via Authorization header.

group.description: Group ID to place field in
